name: complex_if_bool_identity_condition_preserves_int_branch
description: Using the typed Bool identity as an if condition must not change the selected Int branch.

name: complex_if_bool_identity_condition_preserves_bool_branch
description: Using the typed Bool identity as an if condition must not change the selected Bool branch.

name: complex_if_identity_true_false_is_condition
description: An if over True and False must be observationally equal to its condition.

name: complex_if_identity_false_true_is_negation_involution
description: Double-swapping Bool branches through encoded negation must recover the original condition.

name: complex_if_negated_condition_swaps_int_branches
description: Encoding logical negation with if must swap the Int branches exactly.

name: complex_if_negated_condition_swaps_bool_branches
description: Encoding logical negation with if must swap the Bool branches exactly.

name: complex_if_nested_same_condition_then_absorbs
description: A nested if in the then branch with the same condition must absorb the dead alternative.

name: complex_if_nested_same_condition_else_absorbs
description: A nested if in the else branch with the same condition must absorb the dead alternative.

name: complex_if_nested_negated_then_absorbs
description: A nested if guarded by the negated outer condition in the then branch must choose its else arm.

name: complex_if_nested_negated_else_absorbs
description: A nested if guarded by the negated outer condition in the else branch must choose its then arm.

name: complex_if_distributes_over_equality_same_condition
description: Equality between two if expressions with the same condition must equal choosing equality branchwise.

name: complex_if_distributes_over_less_than_same_condition
description: Less-than between if expressions sharing a condition must be equivalent to branchwise less-than.

name: complex_if_distributes_over_lte_same_condition
description: Less-or-equal between if expressions sharing a condition must be equivalent to branchwise less-or-equal.

name: complex_if_distributes_over_greater_than_same_condition
description: Greater-than between if expressions sharing a condition must be equivalent to branchwise greater-than.

name: complex_if_distributes_over_gte_same_condition
description: Greater-or-equal between if expressions sharing a condition must be equivalent to branchwise greater-or-equal.

name: complex_if_branchwise_add_same_condition
description: Adding two if expressions with the same condition must choose the branchwise sum.

name: complex_if_branchwise_sub_same_condition
description: Subtracting two if expressions with the same condition must choose the branchwise difference.

name: complex_if_branchwise_mul_same_condition
description: Multiplying two if expressions with the same condition must choose the branchwise product.

name: complex_if_add_common_left_factor
description: A common left addend can be lifted across an if expression.

name: complex_if_add_common_right_factor
description: A common right addend can be lifted across an if expression.

name: complex_if_sub_common_right_factor
description: Subtracting a common right operand distributes over an if expression.

name: complex_if_sub_common_left_factor
description: Subtracting an if expression from a common left operand distributes branchwise.

name: complex_if_mul_common_left_factor
description: Multiplying a common left operand across an if expression must choose branchwise products.

name: complex_if_mul_common_right_factor
description: Multiplying a common right operand across an if expression must choose branchwise products.

name: complex_if_compare_common_left_lt
description: Less-than from a common left operand to an if expression must choose branchwise comparisons.

name: complex_if_compare_common_right_lt
description: Less-than from an if expression to a common right operand must choose branchwise comparisons.

name: complex_if_compare_common_left_lte
description: Less-or-equal from a common left operand to an if expression must choose branchwise comparisons.

name: complex_if_compare_common_right_lte
description: Less-or-equal from an if expression to a common right operand must choose branchwise comparisons.

name: complex_do_inside_add_left_operand_erases_setup
description: A Bool setup expression sequenced before an Int operand must not affect addition.

name: complex_do_inside_add_right_operand_erases_setup
description: A Bool setup expression sequenced before the right Int operand must not affect addition.

name: complex_do_inside_sub_left_operand_erases_setup
description: A setup expression sequenced before the left subtraction operand must not affect subtraction.

name: complex_do_inside_sub_right_operand_erases_setup
description: A setup expression sequenced before the right subtraction operand must not affect subtraction.

name: complex_do_inside_mul_left_operand_erases_setup
description: A setup expression sequenced before the left multiplication operand must not affect multiplication.

name: complex_do_inside_mul_right_operand_erases_setup
description: A setup expression sequenced before the right multiplication operand must not affect multiplication.

name: complex_do_inside_comparison_left_operand_erases_setup
description: Sequencing before the left comparison operand must not affect less-than.

name: complex_do_inside_comparison_right_operand_erases_setup
description: Sequencing before the right comparison operand must not affect less-than.

name: complex_do_inside_if_condition_erases_setup
description: Sequencing an Int setup before an if condition must not change the selected branch.

name: complex_do_inside_if_then_branch_erases_setup
description: Sequencing before only the then branch must be equivalent to the original branch value.

name: complex_do_inside_if_else_branch_erases_setup
description: Sequencing before only the else branch must be equivalent to the original branch value.

name: complex_do_nested_if_condition_last_value
description: Nested do forms in an if condition must expose only the final Bool.

name: complex_do_branchwise_bool_result
description: An if returning Bool through do-wrapped branches must match the direct Bool if.

name: complex_do_triple_returns_final_int
description: A three-expression do form with mixed types must return the final Int expression.

name: complex_do_triple_returns_final_bool
description: A three-expression do form with mixed types must return the final Bool expression.

name: complex_do_false_expected_after_true_setup
description: A do form that ends in False must print False even after an arbitrary setup expression.

name: complex_do_true_expected_after_false_setup
description: A do form that ends in True must print True even after a False middle expression.

name: complex_with_condition_binding_controls_int_if
description: A Bool bound in with must control the same Int branch as the original condition.

name: complex_with_condition_binding_controls_bool_if
description: A Bool bound in with must control the same Bool branch as the original condition.

name: complex_with_int_binding_used_in_both_if_branches
description: A with-bound Int used in both branches must remain the same value regardless of condition.

name: complex_with_shadowed_condition_inside_then_branch
description: A Bool condition shadowed inside the then branch must not affect outer branch selection.

name: complex_with_shadowed_condition_inside_else_branch
description: A Bool condition shadowed inside the else branch must not affect outer branch selection.

name: complex_with_shadowed_int_inside_then_branch
description: An Int binding shadowed only inside the then branch must affect only that branch.

name: complex_with_shadowed_int_inside_else_branch
description: An Int binding shadowed only inside the else branch must affect only that branch.

name: complex_with_multiple_bindings_expression_dependencies
description: Later with bindings may depend on earlier bindings and should preserve the expected expanded expression.

name: complex_with_dependency_shadowing_order
description: Shadowing after a dependent binding must not retroactively change the earlier dependent value.

name: complex_with_do_preserves_bound_value_after_setup
description: A bound Int returned after a setup expression inside do must preserve the bound value.

name: complex_with_do_shadowed_value_is_last
description: A shadowed value inside a do body must return the innermost binding.

name: complex_with_do_outer_visible_after_inner_expression
description: An outer binding must remain visible after an inner shadowing expression has completed.

name: complex_with_if_bound_min_branch
description: Binding min and max must make the less-or-equal branch choose the min value.

name: complex_with_if_bound_max_branch
description: Binding min and max must make the greater-or-equal branch choose the max value.

name: complex_with_bound_min_max_sum_through_do
description: Min/max decomposition of a pair must survive with binding and do sequencing.

name: complex_with_bound_min_max_difference_abs_branch
description: The difference between max and min should match the branchwise non-negative difference.

name: complex_with_bound_condition_reused_in_arithmetic
description: A bound condition reused around arithmetic must be equivalent to direct use of the original condition.

name: complex_with_bound_expression_used_in_nested_if
description: A computed with-bound expression used in a nested if must equal the expanded expression.

name: complex_order_lt_implies_not_gte_via_if
description: Strict less-than must make the reversed greater-or-equal false only through the encoded branch.

name: complex_order_gt_implies_not_lte_via_if
description: Strict greater-than must make less-or-equal false through encoded implication.

name: complex_order_lte_and_gte_force_equality
description: If both less-or-equal and greater-or-equal hold, equality must hold.

name: complex_order_equality_forces_two_sided_bounds
description: Equality must imply both less-or-equal and greater-or-equal when encoded with nested if.

name: complex_order_lt_forces_lte_not_equal
description: Strict less-than must imply non-equality while preserving less-or-equal.

name: complex_order_gt_forces_gte_not_equal
description: Strict greater-than must imply non-equality while preserving greater-or-equal.

name: complex_order_lte_partition_lt_or_eq
description: Less-or-equal must partition into strict less-than or equality.

name: complex_order_gte_partition_gt_or_eq
description: Greater-or-equal must partition into strict greater-than or equality.

name: complex_order_totality_lte_or_gte_nested
description: At least one of less-or-equal or greater-or-equal must hold for generated Int expressions.

name: complex_order_totality_lt_eq_gt_nested
description: Exactly the trichotomy path must make one of less-than, equality, or greater-than true.

name: complex_order_lt_transitive_nested_if
description: Strict less-than transitivity should hold through nested if guards.

name: complex_order_gt_transitive_nested_if
description: Strict greater-than transitivity should hold through nested if guards.

name: complex_order_lte_transitive_nested_if
description: Less-or-equal transitivity should hold through nested if guards.

name: complex_order_gte_transitive_nested_if
description: Greater-or-equal transitivity should hold through nested if guards.

name: complex_order_lt_not_symmetric
description: Both directions of strict less-than cannot be true simultaneously.

name: complex_order_gt_not_symmetric
description: Both directions of strict greater-than cannot be true simultaneously.

name: complex_order_self_lt_via_do_false
description: Strict less-than of a value against itself must remain false after do sequencing.

name: complex_order_self_gt_via_do_false
description: Strict greater-than of a value against itself must remain false after do sequencing.

name: complex_lattice_min_distributes_over_max_left
description: In a total order, min distributes over max on the left.

name: complex_lattice_min_distributes_over_max_right
description: In a total order, min distributes over max on the right.

name: complex_lattice_max_distributes_over_min_left
description: In a total order, max distributes over min on the left.

name: complex_lattice_max_distributes_over_min_right
description: In a total order, max distributes over min on the right.

name: complex_lattice_median_identity_form_one
description: Two canonical min/max median encodings must agree.

name: complex_lattice_median_identity_form_two
description: The median encoded as max of pairwise mins must equal min of pairwise maxes.

name: complex_lattice_max_of_min_pair_is_left_when_lower_bound
description: If a is less than or equal to both bounds, max of the two mins with a must recover a.

name: complex_lattice_min_of_max_pair_is_left_when_upper_bound
description: If a is greater than or equal to both bounds, min of the two maxes with a must recover a.

name: complex_lattice_min_max_idempotent_deep
description: A deep alternation of min and max should collapse by absorption.

name: complex_lattice_max_min_idempotent_deep
description: A deep alternation of max and min should collapse by absorption.

name: complex_lattice_min_associative_four_terms
description: Four-way regrouping of min should be associative.

name: complex_lattice_max_associative_four_terms
description: Four-way regrouping of max should be associative.

name: complex_lattice_min_max_sum_preserves_two_values
description: For two values, min plus max must equal the original sum.

name: complex_lattice_min_max_product_preserves_two_values
description: For two values, min times max must equal the original product.

name: complex_lattice_min_selected_by_lte_guard
description: When a <= b, min must select a; otherwise it must select b.

name: complex_lattice_max_selected_by_lte_guard
description: When a <= b, max must select b; otherwise it must select a.

name: complex_lattice_min_selected_by_gte_guard
description: When a >= b, min must select b; otherwise it must select a.

name: complex_lattice_max_selected_by_gte_guard
description: When a >= b, max must select a; otherwise it must select b.

name: complex_lattice_min_result_is_one_operand
description: The min of two generated Int expressions must be equal to one of the operands.

name: complex_lattice_max_result_is_one_operand
description: The max of two generated Int expressions must be equal to one of the operands.

name: complex_lattice_min_between_bounds
description: The minimum must be less than or equal to the maximum.

name: complex_lattice_no_value_below_min_and_above_max
description: A value below both operands is below min; a value above both operands is above max.

name: complex_lattice_value_above_both_above_max
description: A value above both operands must be above their max.

name: complex_lattice_clamp_lower_bound_when_ordered
description: When lo <= hi, clamping with max then min must never fall below lo.

name: complex_lattice_clamp_upper_bound_when_ordered
description: When lo <= hi, clamping with max then min must never exceed hi.

name: complex_lattice_clamp_idempotent_when_ordered
description: A clamped value should be idempotent under the same clamp when bounds are ordered.

name: complex_lattice_clamp_passthrough_when_in_range
description: When x is between ordered bounds, clamp should return x.

name: complex_arith_nested_add_sub_cancels_middle
description: A deeply nested add/sub expression should cancel the middle addend.

name: complex_arith_sub_of_two_offsets_cancels_base
description: Subtracting two values sharing the same base should remove the base and leave the offset difference.

name: complex_arith_add_of_differences_regroups
description: The sum of two differences should regroup to subtract the sum of subtrahends.

name: complex_arith_difference_of_sums_regroups
description: The difference of two sums should regroup to sum the pairwise differences.

name: complex_arith_mul_difference_of_sums_distributes
description: Multiplying a regrouped difference of sums should agree with distributing over pairwise differences.

name: complex_arith_square_difference_factorization
description: The difference of squares factorization should hold for generated Int expressions.

name: complex_arith_binomial_square_expansion
description: The square of a sum must match the expanded binomial form.

name: complex_arith_binomial_difference_square_expansion
description: The square of a difference must match the expanded binomial form.

name: complex_arith_mul_by_sum_of_three_distributes
description: Multiplication must distribute over a three-term sum.

name: complex_arith_sum_of_scaled_terms_factors
description: A common multiplicative factor across three terms should factor out.

name: complex_arith_negated_sum_equals_sum_of_negations
description: Negating a three-term sum should equal summing the individual negations.

name: complex_arith_subtracting_negated_sum_adds
description: Subtracting a negated sum should add the positive terms.

name: complex_arith_add_then_subtract_nested_if_operand
description: Adding and then subtracting the same if-selected operand must recover the base.

name: complex_arith_subtract_then_add_nested_if_operand
description: Subtracting and then adding the same if-selected operand must recover the base.

name: complex_arith_if_selected_zero_absorbs_multiplication
description: Multiplication by an if-selected zero should produce zero regardless of the other branch path.

name: complex_arith_if_selected_one_identity_multiplication
description: Multiplication by an if-selected one should preserve the other operand.

name: complex_arith_helper_add_sub_roundtrip_through_id
description: A value passed through identity after add/sub roundtrip should preserve the original expression.

name: complex_arith_helper_mul_one_roundtrip_through_id
description: A value multiplied by a computed one and passed through identity should preserve the original.

name: complex_arith_expected_false_successor_equals_self
description: A value plus one should not equal the value itself in generated ranges.

name: complex_arith_expected_false_double_is_zero_unless_not_asserted
description: The expression a-a+1 equals zero should always be false.

name: complex_function_choose_less_matches_min_with_fallback_second
description: Choosing the lesser value with the right operand as fallback should match min.

name: complex_function_choose_less_matches_if_after_binding
description: The choose-less helper must match its if definition even when operands are bound first.
law: (= (with [x {a} y {b} z {fallback}] (fuzz-choose-less x y z)) (with [x {a} y {b} z {fallback}] (if (fuzz-lt? x y) x z)))

name: complex_function_choose_less_with_max_fallback
description: Choosing a when it is less than b and otherwise max(a,b) must always produce min/max-selected value equal to min when ordered or max otherwise.

name: complex_function_min_max_helpers_are_order_duals
description: Min and max helpers should swap when argument order is swapped.

name: complex_function_predicate_helpers_branch_consistency
description: Comparison helper predicates used as if conditions must agree with direct operator branches.

name: complex_function_equality_helper_branch_consistency
description: The typed equality helper used as an if condition must agree with direct equality.

name: complex_function_bool_idempotent_through_nested_if
description: Bool identity must commute through nested Bool if expressions.

name: complex_function_int_id_commutes_with_min
description: Int identity should commute with min helper application.

name: complex_function_int_id_commutes_with_max
description: Int identity should commute with max helper application.

name: complex_function_comparison_helpers_survive_do_wrapping
description: Comparison helpers must ignore setup expressions wrapped through do around operands.

name: complex_combo_with_do_if_min_max_branch_sum
description: Combining with, do, if, min, and max should preserve the selected branch sum.

name: complex_combo_nested_bindings_if_arithmetic_roundtrip
description: Nested bindings and an if-selected offset should roundtrip through add/sub cancellation.

name: complex_combo_nested_do_if_comparison_roundtrip
description: Do sequencing inside a Bool identity and if condition should preserve comparison branch behavior.

name: complex_combo_ordered_clamp_sum_decomposition
description: When bounds are ordered, clamped value should sit between bounds and remain idempotent under with-bound reuse.

name: complex_combo_min_max_under_same_if_condition
description: Min and max of branchwise if operands should equal branchwise min/max under the same condition.

name: complex_combo_deep_shadowing_branch_specific_arithmetic
description: Deep shadowing inside condition-selected branches must remain branch-local while arithmetic uses the selected value.

name: complex_combo_order_implication_with_computed_bounds
description: If c is below both values then it must be below their min, with bindings and helper comparisons involved.

name: complex_combo_order_implication_with_computed_upper_bound
description: If c is above both values then it must be above their max, with bindings and helper comparisons involved.

name: complex_combo_false_unreachable_strict_cycle
description: A strict increasing cycle cannot be true; this catches incorrect comparison lowering.

name: complex_combo_false_reverse_strict_cycle
description: A strict decreasing cycle cannot be true; this catches reversed comparison lowering.
